discrepancy_labels.expected_evidence: PO, invoice, and receipt lines agree exactly.
Invoice quantity differs from ordered and received quantity.
Invoice unit price differs from purchase order unit price.
Second PO line has no corresponding invoice line.
Second PO and invoice line has no corresponding receipt line.
Two invoices share the same invoice number, supplier, totals, and lines.
Invoice supplier name uses a controlled synthetic alias.
Receipt date is later than expected receipt date.
Synthetic extraction metadata marks invoice unit price as low confidence.
Ground truth records an invalid extracted required field for later validation.
